message:
audit: batch 384 — deep mpsc.rs audit (1901L SOUND) + CRLF sanitization in websocket handshake

Deep audit: src/channel/mpsc.rs (1901 lines) — SOUND. Verified cancel-safety
of two-phase reserve/send, waker cascade ordering, atomic memory ordering
(Release/Acquire/Relaxed correctness), capacity accounting, and all critical
paths including receiver drop, sender clone/drop, and WeakSender upgrade.

Includes agent change: src/net/websocket/handshake.rs — defense-in-depth
CRLF injection prevention in extension offer sanitization, with regression test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
